input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.2.1
            TITLE: when modeled as an “l” shaped section the ei of the front bulkhead about both vertical and

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.2.1: When modeled as an “L” shaped section the EI of the Front Bulkhead about both vertical and
F.7.2.1 When modeled as an “L” shaped section the EI of the Front Bulkhead about both vertical and 
lateral axis must be equivalent to that of the tubes specified for the Front Bulkhead per F.6.1

final_answer: rule F.7.2.1: When modeled as an “L” shaped section the EI of the Front Bulkhead about both vertical and lateral axis must be equivalent to that of the tubes specified for the Front Bulkhead per F.6.1
